name: node-gman
description: TypeScript/Node.js client SDK and CLI for the g-mand trade daemon

scripts.prebuild: node -e "const fs = require('fs'); if (fs.existsSync('../proto/daemon.proto')) { if (!fs.existsSync('proto')) fs.mkdirSync('proto'); fs.copyFileSync('../proto/daemon.proto', 'proto/daemon.proto'); }" && npx proto-loader-gen-types --keepCase --longs=String --enums=String --defaults --oneofs --grpcLib=@grpc/grpc-js --outDir=src/proto/ proto/daemon.proto

author: Lemon4ksan
